title: CARA (OSD-120) spaceflight root transcriptome reanalysis integrated with the Virtual Root auxin model
description: Reanalysis of the CARA Arabidopsis thaliana root-tip RNA-seq (NASA OSDR OSD-120) integrated with an open, cell-based auxin-transport model (the Virtual Root). Shows that spaceflight suppresses columella PIN3/PIN7 in a light- and genotype-dependent manner, and that this confines auxin toward the quiescent centre; and that gravitropic auxin asymmetry scales with gravity level (microgravity, Moon, Mars, Earth, 2 g). Contains the reproducible reanalysis pipeline and scripts, extracted PIN/AUX1 fold-changes, the microgravity/partial-gravity model figures, and a peer-review manuscript draft. Public domain (CC0).
